svg.title: Syncbridge complete flow — 13 steps
svg.desc: 13 sequential steps showing how to use Syncbridge from opening VS Code to AI resuming with full context.
svg.text: Set active project to <your-project> — Ctrl+Shift+A (VS Code window)
Open your project's Claude.ai Project in Chrome
Ask Claude something about your project
Chrome extension auto-copies response — watch for ✓ Auto-copied response
Press Ctrl+Shift+X (VS Code window) — writes to <your-project>/claude-ai.md
In Claude Code CLI terminal (<your-project> directory) — type /sync
Watch claude-state.md update automatically via PostToolUse hook
Open Syncbridge panel Ctrl+Shift+S (VS Code window) — verify files have real content
Click ⟳ Regenerate context.md in Syncbridge panel
Click Copy next to claude-context.md in panel
Open new claude.ai chat — press Alt+V (Chrome browser) to inject
Press Enter — AI resumes with full context
